name: System Doc Alignment
description: Audit and reconcile active documentation and governance metadata against the live repository tree, then archive historical material.
author: Codex

phases.name: Governance & Discovery
phases.description: Align `.agent/` discovery docs, plan guidance, and governance config with current workflows and source ownership.

phases.name: Repo & Domain Docs
phases.description: Update repo entry docs, testing guidance, and domain docs to reflect current commands, routes, and contracts.

phases.name: Archive & Closeout
phases.description: Archive historical docs, capture the audit changelog, and move the plan record under `.agent/plans/archive/`.

notes: Documentation-only remediation. No runtime behavior changes are in scope.
